summary: Iteration 116 - V4 Trustless Symmetric Disputes System Testing: All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for symmetric position submission with confirmation modal. Complete rework from asymmetric accuser/accused model to symmetric V4 model working correctly.

backend_api: ✅ GET /api/disputes/mine returns V4 fields: my_role, my_position, can_submit_position, other_party_responded
✅ GET /api/disputes/{id} returns V4 fields: my_declaration, my_role, my_position, can_submit_position, other_party_responded, is_resolved
✅ All dispute status values are V4 compliant (awaiting_positions, agreed_present, agreed_absent, agreed_late_penalized, escalated, resolved)
✅ Declaration summary includes declared_absent_count, declared_present_count, has_tech_evidence
✅ Found disputes in awaiting_positions status with can_submit_position=True
✅ Position submission endpoint accepts confirmed_present, confirmed_absent, confirmed_late_penalized
frontend_playwright: ✅ DisputesListPage shows 22 dispute cards with '17 en cours' badge
✅ Action hint 'Votre réponse est attendue' shown when can_submit_position=true
✅ Action hint 'En attente de l'autre partie' shown when my position submitted but other hasn't
✅ Action hint 'En cours d'arbitrage' shown for escalated disputes
✅ 'Ce qui s'est passé' block (data-testid='dispute-summary') shows declaration counts
✅ 'Votre position' block (data-testid='dispute-position-block') shows 3 buttons when can_submit_position=true
✅ Position buttons: present (green), absent (red), late (orange) with correct labels
✅ Confirmation modal (data-testid='confirm-position-block') appears after clicking position button
✅ Confirmation modal shows irreversibility warning 'Cette action est irréversible'
✅ Cancel button (data-testid='cancel-position-btn') works correctly - closes modal
✅ Position submitted block (data-testid='dispute-position-submitted') shows after submission
✅ Escalated info block (data-testid='dispute-escalated-info') shows for escalated disputes

seed_data_creation: None - used existing disputes with V4 fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 Trustless Symmetric Disputes System is fully implemented and tested. The old /concede and /maintain endpoints are removed (return 404). Both organizer and participant use the same POST /api/disputes/{id}/position endpoint with positions: confirmed_present, confirmed_absent, confirmed_late_penalized. Mutual agreement auto-resolves disputes. Disagreement auto-escalates to platform arbitration. Some disputes are in various states (awaiting_positions, escalated, resolved) from testing.

features_verified.3_dispute_detail_v4_fields: ✅ VERIFIED - my_declaration, my_role, my_position, can_submit_position, other_party_responded, is_resolved
features_verified.19_frontend_action_hint_required: ✅ VERIFIED - 'Votre réponse est attendue' when can_submit_position=true
features_verified.20_frontend_action_hint_waiting: ✅ VERIFIED - 'En attente de l'autre partie' when waiting for other
